case_title: KYONG KIM VS. KANG UNYI et al

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT, BOTH PARTIES PRESENT IN COURT, CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER (TED KIM) SWORN TO TRANSLATE FOR THE PLAINTIFF, EVIDENCE FOR BOTH SIDES RETAINED, NOTHING ON RECORD; CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506
